stemHtml: On a normally aspirated aero-engine fitted with a fixed pitch propeller:

options.a: manifold pressure decreases as the aeroplane climbs at a fixed throttle setting.
options.b: in a descent at a fixed throttle setting manifold pressure will always remain constant.
options.c: in level flight, manifold pressure will remain constant when the rpm is increased by opening the throttle.
options.d: the propeller setting is constant at all indicated airspeeds.
